task.en:
Find this Mac's system details in System Settings and record them in Notes. Create a new note titled exactly `System Card`. The body must contain exactly these THREE lines, with each placeholder replaced by the real current value read from System Settings:
```
Model Identifier: <model id, e.g. MacBookPro18,1>
macOS Version: <X.Y.Z>
Memory: <NN GB>
```
Get `Model Identifier` from System Settings → General → About → click `More Info…` (or the system report). Get `macOS Version` from System Settings → General → About (the macOS version, written X.Y.Z). Get `Memory` from System Settings → General → About (written as `NN GB`). Do not add any other notes.

pre_command: for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 2; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: MID=$(sysctl -n hw.model 2>/dev/null); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "System Card"' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$MID" ] && echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "Model Identifier: $MID" && echo True || echo False

MV=$(sw_vers -productVersion 2>/dev/null); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "System Card"' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$MV" ] && echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "macOS Version: $MV" && echo True || echo False

GB=$(( $(sysctl -n hw.memsize 2>/dev/null) / 1073741824 )); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "System Card"' 2>/dev/null); [ "$GB" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "Memory: ${GB} GB" && echo True || echo False
